data.title: Powell: Don't expect the Fed to rescue the market, Trump is changing every day
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell said on Wednesday that market expectations that the Fed would intervene to calm volatility may be misplaced. "My answer is no, but I'll explain," Fed Chairman Jerome Powell said when asked if the Fed would intervene in response to the sharp drop in the stock market. "I think the market is digesting what's going on, the market is dealing with a lot of uncertainty, and that means volatility," Powell said while attending a conference in Chicago. Powell said it was understandable that the market would have difficulty given that U.S. President Trump's tariff regime is undergoing a big change. He also explained that it is difficult to know in real time what is causing trouble. "I've had a lot of experience with major market fluctuations, such as the bond market, and often people will form an idea and look back two months later and find that the original view was completely wrong. So it's premature to tell what's happening in the market now," Powell said. For now, he noted that the market's turmoil is partly due to hedge funds reducing leverage or debt, adding: "In the short term, you may continue to see volatility in the market."

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes closed sharply lower
data.description: The three major U.S. stock indexes closed sharply lower, with the Nasdaq down 3.07%, the Dow down 1.73%, and the S&P 500 down 2.24%. Large technology stocks fell collectively, with Nvidia down more than 6%, Tesla down more than 4%, Apple, Meta, and Microsoft down more than 3%, and Amazon and Google down more than 2%.

data.title: Gary Gensler Issues Altcoin Warning, Says Memecoins and ‘Sentiment Tokens’ Likely To Lose Public’s Interest
data.description:
The former Chair of the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Gary Gensler is warning that the future of non-Bitcoin (BTC) crypto assets is looking bleak
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/16/gary-gensler-issues-altcoin-warning-says-memecoins-and-sentiment-tokens-likely-to-lose-publics-interest/

data.title: Tether and Coinbase Among Largest Centralized Finance (CeFi) Lenders in Crypto, According to Galaxy Analyst
data.description:
Stablecoin issuer Tether is the largest centralized finance lender (CeFi) in the digital asset space, according to new analysis. Zack Pokorny, a research analyst at the crypto investment giant Galaxy Digital, notes that Galaxy and the Bitcoin (BTC) lending firm Ledn were the second and third-largest lenders, respectively.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/16/tether-and-coinbase-among-largest-centralized-finance-cefi-lenders-in-crypto-according-to-galaxy-analyst/

Strong demand for home loans in the eurozone, EU housing prices rise
data.description:
Net demand for new home loans continues to grow across the eurozone, according to the latest data released by Europe’s monetary authority. The strong increase, attributed to easing credit requirements and lower interest rates, comes against the backdrop of rising house prices and rents in the EU. data.title: Bybit to end multiple Web3 services in strategic pivot
data.description:
Crypto exchange Bybit announced that it will discontinue a wide range of its Wweb3 products and services by the end of May, according to an April 16 notice. The exchange said the decision is part of a shift in its operational focus as it enters a new phase of growth and innovation.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bybit-to-end-multiple-web3-services-in-strategic-pivot/

data.title: Fed's Powell reasserts support for stablecoin legislation
data.description:
As digital assets gain mainstream adoption, establishing a legal framework for stablecoins is a “good idea,” said US Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. In an April 16 panel at the Economic Club of Chicago, Powell commented on the evolution of the cryptocurrency industry, which has delivered a consumer use case that “could have wide appeal” following a difficult “wave of failures and frauds,” he said. Powell delivers remarks at the Economic Club of Chicago
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/fed-powell-reasserts-support-stablecoin-legislation?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
